# Curated gcc.c-torture/execute smoke subset for task 11-14.
#
# Keep this file to relative paths under the fetched gcc-torture checkout.
# The GPL test sources themselves stay ignored and are fetched only with
# `cargo xtask fetch-testsuites --include-gpl --only gcc-torture`.
